attributes.name: [Airflow OTel] Tasks starving due to pool limits

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving IS NOT NULL
// Gauge: tasks that cannot run due to pool slot limits
| STATS max_starving = MAX(airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving)
// Adjust threshold (5) based on acceptable starvation
| WHERE max_starving > 5
